'''KatholNet''' was a local [[NewsNet]] that covered events in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. [[Dana Cadwell]] was the [[Gandle Ott]] correspondent in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*{{DarkStryder|adventure=Death Is Remotely Possible|book=The DarkStryder Campaign|reprint=yes}} {{1st}}
